features.featureTitle: Replace the main Hero/Welcome card text at the top of the Basic Information page with the exact provided content. Title: 'Get Your Health Readiness Score'. Subtitle: 'जानें अपना हेल्थ रेडीनेस स्कोर'. Description: 'Difference Between Current Habits & Optimal Health Lifestyle. Discover The Current Condition of Your Body & Understand What kind of Care, Correction & Routine Adjustment it Needs — and when.' Hindi Description: 'आपकी आज की आदतों और आपकी सबसे बेहतरीन सेहत के बीच का फासला.' Benefits list: '1. You'll Get to Know Your Health More Closely & Find Out How Ready You are for a Change. 2. Through Guided Questions, You will Recognize what Healthy Habits You are Missing. 3. You will Identify Small Daily Routine Mistakes that may be Creating Long-Term Health Problems.' Preserve all structural UI elements, form fields, toggles, and buttons on the page.

Change the Medical History card background color to a very light pale mint/sage green (#EBF3ED). Keep the card's current position, layout, and all existing styling exactly the same. Ensure text remains highly readable with premium appearance.
